identity.title: MCP planner truncation stress plan artifact
identity.summary: WBS-16 stress fixture with twenty-four WBS rows for planner-packet truncation ladder CI evidence

goals: Prove D3 truncation ladder under MCP planner-packet stress
implementationGuidance: Pair with brainstorm stress payload in truncation stress test
whatNotToDo: Do not treat as production plan
assumptions: Brainstorm ideation overflow is composed in test/mcp-planner-truncation-stress.test.mjs
